productName: Green Reaper Live Resin Badder - Wedding Cake - 1g
description: Whipped hybrid badder from Wedding Cake with the look and feel of cake batter — gold, creamy, and scoop-ready, agitated to coax out maximum aroma. Creamy, terpy, and easy to handle — with notes of vanilla, pepper, and butter, with a balanced head-and-body experience.
